title: Extract data from Monday API
excerpt:
Hi! 
Im working as a consultant and have a case where im going to extract data from the monday API. But before I can start the project, the customer want to make sure that their daily work in by monday won´t be affacted …

posts.author: Ludwe (Ludwig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
Im working as a consultant and have a case where im going to extract data from the monday API. But before I can start the project, the customer want to make sure that their daily work in by monday won´t be affacted by the api calls.

So the question is, will API calls affect the performance of their monday platform?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Ludwe and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Your API calls should not affect their performance when using monday via the UI.

Cheers,
Matias
